summary: Tested MacBook luxury landing page (backend newsletter API + full frontend UX). Backend: all 7 pytest cases pass against public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Frontend: hero, navbar (desktop + mobile), feature cards, performance, gallery (next/prev/thumbnail), specs, testimonials, pricing (incl. Pro highlight + buy toast), and footer newsletter (API integration + success toast) all work. Responsive layouts verified at 390/768/1440.
critical_code_review_comments: Newsletter endpoint stores email as string (cast from EmailStr) before insert — clean. Idempotency implemented correctly without raising.

Gallery.jsx puts data-testid='gallery-active-image' on a wrapper motion.div, not the . Tests have to dig into the child for src. Suggest moving the data-testid to the actual element (or add gallery-active-img to the inner img) for easier automation.
server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('shutdown'); newer FastAPI prefers lifespan handlers. Not blocking.
CORS_ORIGINS default '*' with allow_credentials=True is technically unsafe; fine for a demo but flag for production.
seed_data_creation: Newsletter docs created with TEST_ prefixed emails for idempotency / count tests. Cleanup not strictly required; volume is negligible.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend public URL: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env. Loader overlay shows for ~1.8s on initial load — wait_for_timeout(2500) before interacting. Gallery active image src lives inside the wrapper [data-testid='gallery-active-image'] -> img. Mobile menu testid: nav-mobile-menu, toggle: nav-mobile-toggle. Pricing buy buttons fire sonner toasts (bottom-right). Newsletter form submits to POST /api/newsletter and shows success toast.
